headline: ETH Institutional adoption accelerating - Bitmine holds 4.8% of supply
summary: Ethereum Institutional nonprofit launched July 1 to accelerate adoption. Bitmine now holds 5.74M ETH (4.8% of circulating supply) worth $8.8B staked. Annual staking rewards projected at $277M. ETH up 11% in July, trading at $1,812.

headline: HIMS secures $400M JPMorgan financing facility
summary: Hims secured up to $400M liquidity from JPMorgan Chase for working capital as it scales. Stock hit 2026 high July 1, up 45% in 30 days. Now trading at $34.38. Novo Nordisk partnership active, full FDA-approved GLP-1 lineup available. Analyst price targets: BofA $37, Canaccord $40.

headline: McKinsey: $3-5T agentic commerce by 2030, infrastructure protocols emerging
summary: McKinsey introduced 6-level automation curve for agentic commerce. Linux Foundation launched Agentic AI Foundation with Anthropic, Google, Microsoft, OpenAI. New protocols: MCP (interoperability), A2A (agent communication), AP2/ACP (payments). Visa and Mastercard launched agentic AI payment tools. Shift from UI to data structures for AI parsing.
